site_description: A short history of Thailand's most ubiquitous dish.
home_subtitle: Thai fried rice was never just leftovers. It travelled from Teochew kitchens to royal palaces to the wok of the cart at the corner of your soi. Five short essays on how a humble dish became a country's signature.
blog_subtitle: A five-part story of khao pad — from Teochew migrants and royal kitchens to street vendors and modern reinventions.
cms_sign_up_description: Set up the first super admin for this site.
cms_sign_up_only_once: Sign-up is only available before the first admin is created.
cms_media_help: Upload images, video, audio, or PDFs. Served from R2, metadata in D1.
cms_media_empty: No media yet. Upload your first file above.
cms_media_delete_confirm: Delete this file? The R2 object and metadata will be removed.
cms_media_folder_delete_confirm: Delete this folder? Sub-folders and assets will fall back to the root.
cms_blocks_help: Reusable snippets you can drop into article and page bodies via block shortcodes.
cms_blocks_empty: No blocks yet. Create one to surface a reusable CTA, callout, or footer in many places at once.
cookie_banner_body: We use a small number of cookies to keep the site working and (with your permission) understand how it's used.
cookie_cat_functional_help: Required for the site to work (login session, language, this consent record). Always on.
cookie_cat_analytics_help: Privacy-friendly page-view counts that help us understand which content is read.
cookie_cat_marketing_help: Third-party tracking and embedded media. Off by default.
cms_pages_help: Static pages: About, Contact, Privacy, etc. Reuses the markdown editor and SEO surface.
cms_pages_empty: No pages yet. Pages are good for permanent content like About, Contact, and Privacy.
cms_pages_slug_help: Lowercase ASCII letters, digits, hyphens. Use slashes for nesting (about/team).
cms_navigation_help: Build the site's primary header and footer menus. Items can target pages, articles, categories, tags, or custom URLs.
cms_navigation_items_empty: No items in this menu yet. Add one below.
cms_pages_seeded: Created {n} pages from templates. They start as drafts — review before publishing.
cms_dashboard_analytics_empty: No data yet. Visit a page on the public site (with analytics consent) to seed the counter.
cms_settings_cfa_token_help: Paste your CWA site token to load the third-party beacon. Only loads when the visitor consents to analytics. Leave blank to use only the first-party D1 counter.
error_404_subtitle: The link might be old, or the page may have moved. Try searching, or head back home.
error_5xx_title: Something went wrong on our side.
error_5xx_subtitle: We've been notified. Try again in a moment, or head back home while we sort it out.
cms_forms_help: Build forms (contact, lead capture, RSVP) and review submissions. Each form has a public POST endpoint.
cms_forms_empty: No forms yet. Create one to start collecting submissions.
cms_forms_fields_empty: No fields yet. Add one with the buttons above.
cms_forms_success_help: Shown after a successful submission. Falls back to a generic thank-you when blank.
cms_forms_submissions_empty: No submissions yet — share the public endpoint to start collecting.
cms_cover_media_help: Paste a media ID from the Media library, or leave blank.
cms_categories_help: Categories group articles into sections. Each article belongs to at most one.
cms_categories_empty: No categories yet. Create one to start organising articles.
cms_category_delete_confirm: Delete this category? Articles using it will keep a dangling reference.
cms_tags_help: Tags are free-form labels. An article can have many.
cms_tag_delete_confirm: Delete this tag? It will be removed from every article that uses it.
cms_users_help: People with access to this CMS. Only super admins and admins can change roles or remove users.
cms_users_empty: Only you so far. Invite a teammate to start collaborating.
cms_user_delete_confirm: Remove this user? Their articles stay but the account is deleted permanently.
cms_user_self_delete_blocked: You can't remove your own account.
cms_user_self_role_blocked: You can't change your own role.
cms_user_last_super_admin_blocked: At least one super admin must remain.
cms_invite_help: Generate a one-shot signup link. The first person to open it claims an account at the chosen role.
cms_invite_link_ready: Invite link ready — share it with your teammate
cms_invite_revoke_confirm: Revoke this invite link? It will stop working immediately.
cms_invite_accept_help: You've been invited to join as {role}. Pick a name and a password to claim {email}.
cms_audit_help: Every change made by an admin or editor is recorded here.
cms_published_at_help: Leave blank to publish immediately when status is set to Published. Set a future time to schedule the post.
cms_history_help: Every save creates a new snapshot per locale. Click any version to compare it with what's live.
cms_history_empty: No saved versions yet. The first save you make will appear here.
cms_history_no_diff: This version is identical to what's live.
cms_history_restore_confirm: Replace the live article with this version? Your current content will be saved as a new history entry first.
cms_settings_help: Site-wide settings. Read by both the public site and the CMS.
cms_settings_site_name_help: Shown in the navbar, page titles, and footer.
cms_settings_default_locale_help: The locale visitors land on at /. Must be one of the supported locales.
cms_settings_cdn_base_url_help: If set, media URLs are rewritten to point at this domain. Leave blank to serve from R2 directly.
cms_no_articles: No articles yet. Create your first one!
cms_seo_title_empty: No override — search engines will use the regular title.
cms_seo_title_long: {len} chars — too long. Google truncates around 60.
cms_seo_description_empty: No override — search engines will use the excerpt.
cms_seo_description_long: {len} chars — too long. Google truncates around 160.
cms_dashboard_welcome: Quick view of what's published, what's queued, and what needs attention.
cms_dashboard_scheduled_empty: Nothing scheduled. Set a future Publish date on any article to queue it.
cms_dashboard_drafts_empty: No drafts. Start something new from the New article button.
cms_dashboard_coverage_help: Of your published articles, how many have content in each locale.
cms_dashboard_activity_empty: No activity yet — actions taken in the CMS will show up here.
cms_article_en_required_help: English content is required. The slug is derived from the English title.
cms_article_th_optional_help: Thai content is optional. Leave blank to publish English-only.
cms_slug_help: Lowercase ASCII letters, digits, hyphens. Auto-derived from the English title.
cms_delete_confirm: Delete this article? This cannot be undone.
cms_editor_preview_empty: Start typing to see a live preview.
